history.content: Step 4 is complete and verified. I confirmed the patch in `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` now dedupes final-step completion by checking durable `write_note` journal entries tagged `[task_complete]` (not truncated `tool_call` content), in both: - final-step prompt branching, and - post-round auto-advance safeguard. I also completed Step 5 by writing the required `write_note` (`tag: task_complete`) with the full implementation/build summary, then marked that step complete.
